verdicts.reasoning: Claim 3 first introduces '第一训练信号' via bare noun in '所述第三信号相关的第一训练信号' — Anti-pattern 1: relative-clause context, no Pattern A/B introduction.

Pattern A in claim 2: '对第三信号进行处理' — bare '第三信号' first introduced as verb-object in claim 2; but claim 2 introduces it as '第三信号' via '对第三信号进行处理得到第四信号' which is first occurrence bare noun. However checking claim 2: '所述第三神经网络用于所述第一设备对第三信号进行处理得到第四信号' — bare noun first occurrence in claim 2 (ancestor). Anti-pattern 1 applies (verb-object). Legit drafting error.
No Pattern A/B introduces '第二训练信号' in claim chain; first occurrence is bare noun in relative-clause context in claim 3.
Claim 3 introduces '差异度' via '之间的差异度满足第一条件' — bare noun first occurrence as verb subject. Anti-pattern 1; legit drafting error.
Claim 3 first mentions '相似度' as bare noun in '相似度满足第二条件'; no Pattern A/B introduction.
Claim 2 (ancestor) introduces '第三信号' only as bare verb-object (Anti-pattern 1); claim 6 depends on claims 2-4, so '所述第三信号' in claim 6 lacks proper antecedent basis.
Same sentence in claim 14 introduces '第一集合' before the '所述第一集合' reference: '从第一集合中选择…，所述第一集合包括' — Pattern A-equivalent bare noun introduced in same sentence before reference.
Tokenization fragment of '第四神经网络' which is introduced in claim 1 via Pattern A ('第四神经网络'). Walker truncated the term.
Same sentence in claim 30 introduces '第一模式': '信息传输模式从第一模式转变为第二模式，所述第一模式包括' — bare noun introduced before '所述第一模式' reference.
Tokenization fragment of '第四起始时刻'; same sentence in claim 33 introduces '第四起始时刻' bare noun before '所述第四起始时刻'.
Tokenization fragment of '第一起始时刻'; ancestor claim 23 introduces '第一起始时刻' as bare noun. Walker truncated term.
Same sentence in claim 38 introduces '网络设备': '终端设备或网络设备' — bare noun in Pattern B-like list before '所述网络设备'.
Same sentence introduces '第一AI模型' before '所述第一AI模型': '是否存储有第一AI模型的信息…其中，所述第一AI模型为任意一个AI模型'.
